summary: MongoDB persistence restart resilience verified. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend shows correct historical analytics after restart: Daily P&L +$53.77, Win Rate 56.2% (200W/156L), Closed Trades 356, P&L Curve showing equity growth from $0 to ~$178. Global Analytics page correctly displays realized_pnl +$178.21, win_rate 56.2%, close_trades 356. load_state_from_db() successfully reconstructs trades, positions, and stats counters from MongoDB on startup.

backend_persistence_tests: GET /api/status shows non-zero stats (total_trades=2246, close_count=356, win_count=200, loss_count=156, win_rate=56.18, daily_pnl=53.77) - PASS
GET /api/positions returns 37 positions loaded from MongoDB snapshot - PASS
GET /api/analytics/pnl-history returns 356+ points array from closed trades - PASS
GET /api/analytics/global strategy_performance shows realized_pnl=178.21, close_trades=356, win_rate=56.2 - PASS
GET /api/analytics/global timeseries.cumulative_pnl has non-zero last point with close_count field - PASS
Data consistency: close_count=356 matches across /api/status, /api/analytics/global, /api/analytics/pnl-history - PASS
GET /api/trades returns trade history including recent trades - PASS
Trade count stable (no duplication) - count stable between requests - PASS
Win rate calculation verified: win_rate = win_count/(win_count+loss_count)*100 = 56.18% - PASS
Engine status is 'running' after loading from MongoDB - PASS
frontend_visual_tests: Overview page: Daily P&L card shows +$53.77 (non-zero) - PASS
Overview page: Win Rate card shows 56.2% with 200W/156L sub-text - PASS
Overview page: Closed Trades card shows 356 - PASS
Overview page: P&L Curve chart shows actual equity growth ($0 to ~$178, peak $199.07) - PASS
Overview page: 40 Open Positions, 1,323 Markets Tracked - PASS
Analytics page Overview tab: Total P&L +$178.21, Win Rate 56.18%, Profit Factor 1.41 - PASS
Analytics page Charts tab: P&L Curve and Daily P&L bar chart with actual data - PASS
Global Analytics page Performance tab: Realized P&L +$178.21, Win Rate 56.2%, Total Trades 2,259 - PASS

features_verified.Backend: Restart resilience - /api/statu: PASS - total_trades=2246, close_count=356, win_count=200, loss_count=156, win_rate=56.18, daily_pnl=53.77
features_verified.Backend: Data consistency after restart: PASS - close_count=356 matches across all 3 endpoints
features_verified.Backend: PnL history after restart: PASS - 356 closed trade points in array
features_verified.Backend: Global analytics timeseries: PASS - cumulative_pnl with close_count field in last point
features_verified.Backend: No trade duplication: PASS - trade count stable between requests
features_verified.Frontend: Overview page stat cards: PASS - Daily P&L +$53.77, Win Rate 56.2% (200W/156L), Closed Trades 356
features_verified.Frontend: Global Analytics page: PASS - Performance tab shows realized_pnl +$178.21, win_rate 56.2%, close_trades 356

critical_code_review_comments: persistence.py load_state_from_db(): Correctly loads trades from MongoDB, reconstructs win_count/loss_count/daily_pnl counters
persistence.py: Sets _last_trade_idx after loading to prevent re-persisting loaded trades (no duplication)
persistence.py: Loads positions_snapshots collection for position reconstruction
state.py add_trade(): Correctly increments win_count/loss_count based on pnl sign (Lines 128-135)
state.py snapshot(): Correctly computes close_count = win_count + loss_count, win_rate from counters (Lines 149-174)
server.py: Calls await engine.persistence.load_state_from_db(state) during lifespan startup (Line 124)
global_analytics_service.py get_signal_timeseries(): Filters closed trades (pnl!=0) for cumulative PnL curve (Lines 206-260)
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing MongoDB data (~2246 trades, 356 closed with pnl!=0, ~37 positions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MongoDB persistence restart resilience verified. The fix (load_state_from_db) correctly reconstructs: (1) trades from MongoDB with win/loss/daily_pnl counters, (2) positions from positions_snapshots collection, (3) sets _last_trade_idx to prevent trade duplication. After Railway restart, dashboard immediately shows historical analytics. Key data: 2246 total trades, 356 closed trades, 200 wins, 156 losses, 56.2% win rate, +$178.21 realized PnL, daily_pnl shows today's UTC closed trades only (~$53.77).

fix_summary.root_cause: All trade state was in-memory only (StateManager). PersistenceService wrote trades to MongoDB but never loaded them back on startup, causing dashboard to show 0 closed trades, 0 PnL, 0 win rate after restart.
fix_applied: persistence.py: Added load_state_from_db() that reconstructs trades, positions, and stats counters from MongoDB on startup
server.py: Calls await engine.persistence.load_state_from_db(state) during lifespan startup (Line 124) before strategies register
fix_summary.verification: After restart, GET /api/status returns total_trades=2246, close_count=356, win_count=200, loss_count=156, win_rate=56.18, daily_pnl=53.77. Frontend Overview and Global Analytics pages display correct historical data.
